raw_consumer_statement:
hello, I booked a stay at XXXX XXXX XXXX through XXXX XXXX for XX/XX/year>, and specifically reserved the XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX 

Unfortunately, the room we received was completely different from the room type that was advertised and booked. The room did not include the river jump platform, which was a key feature and one of the main reasons we chose this XXXX XXXX. My daughter was extremely disappointed, and this significantly impacted our vacation experience. 

We attempted to resolve the issue directly with the hotel during our stay, but no satisfactory solution was provided. Since the room delivered did not match the room we paid for, I am requesting a refund of the {$2000.00} price difference between the XXXX XXXX XXXX we booked and the room we actually received. 

I would appreciate your prompt attention to this matter and look ward to resolving this fairly. 

Thank you
